description: Entry has spread check (>0.15 rejects), but exit had no spread check — exits at terrible prices in wide-spread markets
resolution_notes: Added exit spread check — trailing stop exit delayed if spread > MAX_ENTRY_SPREAD. Take profit exits always execute (price is favorable).

description: Resolving market thresholds (0.02/0.98) hardcoded in paper_engine and tracker.py independently — could diverge
Entry at ASK, detection at MIDPOINT, exit at BID — three different price conventions in the pipeline
resolution_notes: Intentional. Entry at ask simulates aggressive taker fill. Detection uses midpoint for stability. Exit at bid simulates worst-case exit. This models real execution accurately.

description: backtest simulate_params has full 'else' branch for direction=='down' (lines 206-214) — dead code since no trades ever have direction=down
resolution_notes: Kept for potential future bidirectional trading support. Low maintenance cost.
